positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial map artwork featuring constellations composed of abstract, interconnected geometric lines and glowing neon dots. The central subject is a large, crescent moon and a spiral galaxy design. The background should be deep indigo and midnight blue, with subtle gradients of violet. The overall aesthetic should be ethereal, high contrast, and modern retro-futuristic, suitable for apparel printing. Incorporate faint nebulae smoke trails and small stylized shooting stars. Clean silhouette style, vector-art quality, intricate line work, dramatic backlighting, high detail, symmetry, central composition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, messy, amateur, signature, text on skin
